creative_direction.reasoning: Typography carries the ad (two-line parallel headline + italic tagline) but the bottom illustration — two figures with a shared cloud of ideas in Notion's house style — is a distinctive visual asset that must be rendered. Track B: background provides pure white + illustration; text composites.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Book-cover editorial headline promising everything/anything, anchored by a line-art human collaboration scene.

nano_banana_json.scene: Pure white editorial poster with a two-line black ExtraBold sans headline upper-third, an italic sans subhead below, a blue CTA pill in middle, and a hand-drawn line-art illustration of two people with a shared thought cloud in the lower third.
nano_banana_json.subject: Editorial book-jacket-style typographic composition.

vertical_zones: Top 7%: Notion N logo + wordmark, centered

text_elements_in_image.punctuation_note: periods are load-bearing — must be present

text_elements_in_image.content: Where human creativity meets AI efficiency.

illustration_spec.style: Notion house illustration style — hand-drawn line art, thin black strokes, flat color fills, imperfect edges.
illustration_spec.content: Two figures seated back-to-back on chairs facing left and right, laptops on laps. Between and above them, a black organic cloud shape containing colorful object doodles: pencil, clock (white), blue checkmark, red ticker-shape, yellow sparkle, sticky note, star burst, moon, feather. The cloud connects the two figures' heads implying shared ideation.

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: White canvas + line-art illustration in bottom 30% only. All text overlaid in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Pure white #FFFFFF canvas 1080x1080, with small Notion N logo + wordmark centered at top (7% from top edge), and in the bottom 30% a Notion house-style line-art illustration of two people back-to-back with laptops, sharing a black organic cloud filled with small colorful object doodles (pencil, clock, checkmark, ticker, sparkle, sticky note). Upper 60% is reserved empty white space.
negative_prompt: text only in the bottom illustration's doodle cloud (objects, not words)

elements.content: Where human creativity meets AI efficiency.

assets.name: Notion N logo + wordmark
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Small geometric black 'N' icon with subtle 3D paper-fold + 'Notion' wordmark ExtraBold, ~36px tall, top-center.

assets.name: Two-figures-sharing-a-thought-cloud illustration
assets.prompt_language_for_image_gen: Hand-drawn line art in Notion's house style: two seated figures (one with short hair, one with longer hair and glasses) facing outward left/right, laptops on laps, chairs visible. Between and above them a solid black organic cloud silhouette containing small colorful object doodles: white-outline pencil, white-outline clock, blue checkbox tick, red ticker bar, yellow four-point sparkle, small sticky note, starburst. Thin consistent stroke weight (~2px), imperfect organic edges, no shading.
assets.fidelity_confidence: medium — iterate if stroke weight inconsistent

prompt_writer_training_notes: Periods in headline are ESSENTIAL — this is the 'verb. verb.' pattern (CP-3). Prompt must explicitly call out the periods or image gen defaults to exclamation or no punctuation. Italic subhead is a register signal; specify 'SemiBold Italic' not just 'italic' (default italic weights look wispy). Illustration style must say 'hand-drawn line art' + 'thin consistent stroke' — otherwise image gen renders it as a polished vector.
